---
title: "Finding Beta is Hard — All Experiments"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    df-print: paged
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(fmatrix)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(progress)

Logdistance_prob <- function(fmat, centre=NULL, beta=1, diam=1, N=25){
  n <- dim(fmat)[1] + 1
  if (is.null(centre)) centre <- kingman_m(n)
  -(beta/diam) * distance_Fmat(fmat, centre, dist="l2")^2/N^4
}

sampleF <- function(M, beta, iter, diam, startF = NULL, take_every = 1){
  acceptance_rate <- 0
  n <- nrow(M) + 1

  chainF <- vector("list", iter/take_every)

  if (is.null(startF)) {
    current_tree <- rcoal(n)
    chainF[[1]]  <- gen_Fmat(current_tree, tol=13)
  } else {
    chainF[[1]] <- startF
  }

  current_Encod <- my_encod(chainF[[1]])
  f_current     <- Fmat_from_myencod(current_Encod)
  Logdist_curr  <- Logdistance_prob(f_current, M, beta=beta, diam=diam)

  MeanM <- matrix(0, nrow=n-1, ncol=n-1)
  
  
  for (j in 1:iter){
    
    proposed    <- proposal_myencod(current_Encod)
    f_proposed  <- Fmat_from_myencod(proposed)
    Logdist_prop <- Logdistance_prob(f_proposed, M, beta=beta, diam=diam)

    prob <- exp(Logdist_prop - Logdist_curr)

    if (runif(1) < prob){
      if(j%%take_every == 0){
        chainF[[j/take_every]] <- f_proposed
      }
      
      current_Encod   <- proposed
      f_current       <- f_proposed
      Logdist_curr    <- Logdist_prop
      acceptance_rate <- acceptance_rate + 1
    } else {
      if(j%%take_every == 0){
        chainF[[j/take_every]] <- f_proposed
      }
    }
    if(j%%take_every == 0){
       MeanM <- MeanM + chainF[[j/take_every]]
      }
    
  }

  MeanM <- MeanM/iter
  list(
    chainF = chainF,
    acceptance_rate = acceptance_rate/iter,
    MeanM = MeanM
  )
}


find_beta_data <- function(chain_data, CD_params,return_samples = FALSE){
  
  
  burn_in     <- CD_params$burn_in
  k           <- CD_params$k
  trials      <- CD_params$trials
  batch_size  <- CD_params$batch_size
  print_every <- CD_params$print_every
  step0       <- CD_params$step0
  beta_star   <- CD_params$beta_star


  diam <- 1

  

  samples <- chain_data
  chain <- chain_data
  
  burn_in <- min(burn_in, length(chain) - 1)
  chain <- chain[(burn_in+1):length(chain)]
  n_data <- length(chain)
  
  
  arr <- simplify2array(chain)
  distro_mean <- apply(arr, c(1, 2), mean)
  
    

  beta_star_list <- numeric(trials)
  
  for (t in 1:trials){
    idx <- sample.int(n_data, batch_size, replace = TRUE)

    s_pos_sum <- 0
    s_neg_sum <- 0

    for (b in 1:batch_size){
      x0 <- chain[[ idx[b] ]]

      d0 <- distance_Fmat(x0, distro_mean, dist = "l2")
      s_pos_sum <- s_pos_sum + d0^2

      out <- sampleF(M = distro_mean, beta = beta_star, iter = k + 1, diam = diam, startF = x0)
      xk <- out$chainF[[ k + 1 ]]

      dk <- distance_Fmat(xk, distro_mean, dist = "l2")
      s_neg_sum <- s_neg_sum + dk^2
    }

    E_pos <- s_pos_sum / batch_size
    E_neg <- s_neg_sum / batch_size
    g_beta <- (E_neg - E_pos) / diam

    step <- step0
    beta_star <- beta_star + step * g_beta
    if (beta_star < 1e-12) beta_star <- 1e-12

    beta_star_list[t] <- beta_star

    if (t %% print_every == 0){
      cat("trial", t, "beta_star", beta_star, "\n")
    }
  }

  out_tbl <- tibble(
    trial = 1:trials,
    beta_star = beta_star_list
  )

  if (return_samples) {
    return(list(
      out_tbl    = out_tbl,
      samples = samples,
      chain   = chain
    ))
  }

  out_tbl
  
}

summarize_run <- function(traj, tail_frac = 0.5){
  # summarize a single trajectory tibble from find_beta()
  T <- nrow(traj)
  start <- floor(T*(1-tail_frac)) + 1
  tibble(
    trials = T,
    beta_star_final = traj$beta_star[T],
    beta_star_mean_tail = mean(traj$beta_star[start:T]),
    beta_star_sd_tail = sd(traj$beta_star[start:T])
  )
}




```




```{r}
library(ape)
library(phangorn)

# -----------------------------
# Load alignment
# -----------------------------
fasta_file <- "output_sequences_saved.fasta"
alignment <- read.phyDat(fasta_file, format = "fasta")

# -----------------------------
# Initial tree
# -----------------------------
dist_matrix <- dist.ml(alignment)
nj_tree <- NJ(dist_matrix)
rooted_tree <- midpoint(nj_tree)

# -----------------------------
# ML fit under strict clock
# -----------------------------
fit <- pml(rooted_tree, data = alignment)
fit <- optim.pml(fit, model = "GTR", optGamma = TRUE, optClock = TRUE, control = pml.control(trace = 1))

# -----------------------------
# Bootstrap with built-in support
# -----------------------------
set.seed(123)
n_boot <- 100

# Bootstrap using the fitted pml object
bs <- bootstrap.pml(fit, bs = n_boot, optNni = TRUE, multicore = FALSE)

# -----------------------------
# Save all bootstrap trees in one file
# -----------------------------
write.tree(bs, file = "ml_bootstrap_trees.trees")
cat("All bootstrap ML ultrametric trees saved in 'ml_bootstrap_trees.trees'.\n")

# Function to force a tree ultrametric by extending tips
root_and_ultra <- function(tree) {
  # Root at midpoint
  tree_rooted <- midpoint(tree)
  
  # Make strictly ultrametric
  max_height <- max(node.depth.edgelength(tree_rooted))
  tree_rooted$edge.length <- tree_rooted$edge.length +
    (max_height - node.depth.edgelength(tree_rooted)[tree_rooted$edge[,2]])
  
  return(tree_rooted)
}

# Apply to all trees
trees_ultra <- lapply(bs, root_and_ultra)

# Save them back together
#write.tree(trees_ultra, file = "ml_bootstrap_trees_ultrametric.trees")
```

```{r}
library(progress)
trees <- read.nexus("HKY100_small-output_sequences_saved.trees")
N <- length(trees)-1
F.list <- vector("list", N)
pb = progress_bar$new("[:bar] :percent", total=N)
for (i in 1:N){
  name <- names(trees)[i]
  pb$tick()
  F.list[[i]] <- gen_Fmat(trees[[name]])  # Assuming 'trees' is a list or data frame
}
```

# N = 10

## Run all experiments (TRUE MEAN)

### iter = 100000

```{r}
CD_params = c()
CD_params$burn_in <- 2000
CD_params$k <- 10
CD_params$trials<- 100000
CD_params$batch_size <- 50
CD_params$print_every <- 1000
CD_params$step0 <- 10

CD_params$beta_star <- 75000

res<- find_beta_data(F.list, CD_params,return_samples = TRUE)
#summarize_run(traj)

```

```{r}

sub_samp = 1000
iter = 10000000
diam = 1
n = 25
res_table = summarize_run(res$out_tbl, tail_frac = 0.5)
beta_star = res_table$beta_star_mean_tail
print(beta_star)

chain_data = res$chain
burn_in <- CD_params$burn_in
arr <- simplify2array(chain_data)
distro_mean <- apply(arr, c(1, 2), mean)




#distance_Fmat(TrueM, TrueM, dist="l2")^2 
rand_tree = chain_data[[sample(length(chain_data), 1)]]

time_taken <- system.time({
  samples_gen <-sampleF(distro_mean,beta_star,iter,diam, startF = rand_tree, take_every = 1000)
})

# Print the time it took
print(time_taken)

chain_gen <-samples_gen$chainF
burn_in <- min(burn_in, length(chain_gen) - 1)
chain_gen <- chain_gen[(burn_in+1):length(chain_gen)]


set.seed(42)             
idx <- sample(length(chain_data), sub_samp)
trees_data <- chain_data[idx]

idx <- sample(length(chain_gen), sub_samp)
trees_gen <- chain_gen[idx]

idx <- sample(length(chain_data), sub_samp)
trees_data2 <- chain_data[idx]

```

```{r}
library(progress)
# 1) Combine trees (ordering matters)
trees_all <- c(trees_data, trees_gen)
n <- length(trees_all)  # should be 2000

# 2) Compute full symmetric distance matrix (compute only i<j pairs once)
D <- matrix(0, n, n)

pb <- progress_bar$new(
  format = "  computing distances [:bar] :percent eta: :eta",
  total = n - 1,
  clear = FALSE,
  width = 60
)

for (i in 2:n) {
  ti <- trees_all[[i]]
  for (j in 1:(i - 1)) {
    d <- distance_Fmat(ti, trees_all[[j]], dist="l2")^2 
    D[i, j] <- d
    D[j, i] <- d
  }
  pb$tick()
}

# 3) Convert to 'dist' and run MDS
D_dist <- as.dist(D)
mds <- cmdscale(D_dist, k = 2, eig = TRUE)

coords <- as.data.frame(mds$points)
colnames(coords) <- c("Dim1", "Dim2")

# 4) Add group labels (first 1000 are A, next 1000 are B)
coords$group <- rep(c("Data", "Generated"), each = sub_samp)

# 5) Plot
plot(
  coords$Dim1, coords$Dim2,
  col = ifelse(coords$group == "Data", "steelblue", "tomato"),
  pch = 16,
  xlab = "MDS 1", ylab = "MDS 2",
  main = "MDS of Tree Distances"
)
legend("topright", legend = c("Data", "Generated"),
       col = c("steelblue", "tomato"), pch = 16, bty = "n")

# 6) (Optional) How much of the distance structure is captured in 2D?
pos_eig <- mds$eig[mds$eig > 0]
prop_2d <- sum(pos_eig[1:2]) / sum(pos_eig)
prop_2d

```
